new_moon.name: New Moon
new_moon.short: The seed moment — invisible, full of potential
new_moon.description: Born under a New Moon, you carry the energy of fresh starts and unwritten possibilities. You are a natural initiator — drawn to beginnings, new projects, and the thrill of something not yet formed. Your life is shaped by cycles of renewal.

waxing_crescent.name: Waxing Crescent
waxing_crescent.short: The first push — desire taking shape
waxing_crescent.description: The Waxing Crescent soul is driven by intention. You set your sights on something and begin moving toward it with quiet determination. You are a builder in motion — always in the process of becoming something greater.

first_quarter.name: First Quarter
first_quarter.short: The turning point — commitment and decision
first_quarter.description: Born at the First Quarter, you are wired for action and decision. You thrive in moments of challenge and cross-roads — when others freeze, you move. Your life is a series of decisive pivots that shape your trajectory.

waxing_gibbous.name: Waxing Gibbous
waxing_gibbous.description: The Waxing Gibbous soul is driven by refinement and improvement. You are never quite satisfied — not from insecurity, but from a deep knowing that things can always be better. Your eye for detail is extraordinary.

full_moon.name: Full Moon
full_moon.short: The peak — full expression and visibility
full_moon.description: Born under a Full Moon, you are here to be seen. You live at peak emotional intensity — feeling everything fully, expressing everything boldly. Your life pulls you toward moments of full illumination, where nothing is hidden.

waning_gibbous.name: Waning Gibbous
waning_gibbous.description: The Waning Gibbous soul is a natural teacher and sharer. You have gathered deep experience and your instinct is to give it away — through mentoring, storytelling, or simply being the wisest person in the room. Your generosity elevates everyone.

last_quarter.name: Last Quarter
last_quarter.short: The turning point — letting go with wisdom
last_quarter.description: Born at the Last Quarter, your life is shaped by the courage to release. You are constantly clearing — old beliefs, old patterns, old relationships that no longer serve. This isn't loss; it is radical wisdom.

waning_crescent.name: Waning Crescent
waning_crescent.short: The rest before the new — deep wisdom and stillness
waning_crescent.description: The Waning Crescent soul carries old-soul energy. You are at the end of a great cycle, integrating everything you've learned across lifetimes. You are deeply intuitive, spiritually attuned, and your wisdom comes from a place most people never reach.
